overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city district during golden hour. The player character walks past vending machines and palm trees, turns at an intersection, observes a flying vehicle passing overhead, and approaches a large circular arena structure with neon lighting. The environment features a mix of high-tech towers and commercial buildings set against desert mountains.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of futuristic vending machines along a city street lined with palm trees. The camera walks forward following a pedestrian in red clothing, with a large circular billboard tower visible ahead and desert mountains in the background. The lighting is warm golden hour sun casting long shadows across the asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with overpass and art deco building

events.description: camera turns right at the intersection, passing under an overpass structure
futuristic flying vehicle enters frame from the right, passing overhead

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and walking under a concrete overpass, then looking up at the flying vehicle

notable_agents.action: flying car passing overhead from right to left across the sky

entered.detail: concrete and metal overpass with support pillars
building with curved roof, red trim, and weathered facade
futuristic hovering car with green and white coloring

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right at an intersection, passing under a concrete overpass and revealing an art deco style building with a curved roof. A flying vehicle suddenly appears overhead, cruising across the sky. The pedestrian in red continues ahead as the camera follows the new path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with cyberpunk towers

events.description: view opens up to reveal tall cyberpunk towers and the large circular arena structure

agents.ego_description: walking forward through the urban plaza while observing the flying vehicle and approaching the large circular structure

entered.detail: tall futuristic tower with 07 marking and industrial scaffolding
massive circular metal framework with purple neon lighting inside

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to a wide urban plaza dominated by a massive circular arena structure with glowing purple lights in the distance. A tall cyberpunk tower marked with 07 rises on the left. The flying vehicle continues across the sky moving leftward as the camera advances toward the circular structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway under circular arena structure

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the large circular metal framework

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beneath the circular arena structure, passing pedestrians and market stalls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket and hat walking toward the camera
person sitting near cardboard boxes and market goods

entered.detail: makeshift tented stall with striped awning and scattered goods
red and white striped concrete barriers lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and enters the area beneath the massive circular arena structure, which now dominates the sky overhead with its intricate metal framework and purple lighting. The walkway is lined with construction barriers and market stalls, with several pedestrians walking in opposing directions. The environment feels more enclosed as the camera moves under the circular arch.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sun-drenched cyberpunk street that gradually transitions into the shadow of a massive neon-lit arena. It begins by following a pedestrian in red past futuristic vending machines and palm trees, with desert mountains framing the horizon under a warm golden hour glow. As the camera turns right at an intersection, it passes under a concrete overpass and an art deco building just as a flying vehicle cruises across the sky. The scene then opens into a wide urban plaza where a tall tower marked 07 stands to the left and a glowing purple circular structure dominates the distance. Finally, the camera advances beneath the intricate metal framework of the arena, moving from the open plaza into a more enclosed walkway lined with market stalls and construction barriers.
